info.name: Factset Get the List of Fields Associated With a Table for Navigator, and the Code Information for the Specified Data Item, if Applicable.

params.name: Table_id
params.description: The id for the Table to fetch the fields for.

params.description: The id for the DataItem. This is required in case the data item is represented as a code in Standard DataFeeds.
